'''Greglik''' was a handsome [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] who flew for the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] during the early days of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
He piloted a reconditioned ore hauler when the Rebels had to continually move [[Planet/Legends|planet]] to planet evading [[Firmus Piett/Legends|Firmus Piett's]] fleet. Though he was a good pilot, his skills were marred by his addiction to drugs like [[Glitterstim/Legends|glitterstim]] and [[sweetblossom]]. The more drugs he used the more his addiction worsened until finally he crashed a ship, which contained seventeen Rebel fighters, into an asteroid killing himself and the rest of his crew.

Despite his addictions and the cause of his death, [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] saw something within him that would make her remember him for years to come, particularly while being held captive by [[Seti Ashgad/Legends|Seti Ashgad]] on [[Nam Chorios/Legends|Nam Chorios]], who had used sweetblossom to drug the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Chief of State (New Republic)/Legends|Chief of State]].
